body: I'd like to log in to BrightFox with my Google Workspace account. Can you walk me through enabling SSO?
Go to Settings, Security, Single Sign-On and choose Google as the provider. Add lauracreates.studio as the verified domain, then confirm the test login. You're all set once the green check appears.
We have a contact list in a spreadsheet. What format does the CSV importer expect for the email and tag columns?
Use a header row with email in one column and tags in another, separating multiple tags with semicolons. The importer matches columns by header name, so you can keep the rest of your sheet as-is.
My studio booking form is on Webflow. Is there a native integration or do I route it through a webhook?

There's no native Webflow connector yet, so a webhook is the cleanest path. Point the form submission at your BrightFox inbound URL and map the name, email, and message fields. I've linked the field reference in this reply.
I'm on monthly and want to move to the annual Studio plan. Will the proration show on the next invoice?
Yes. The switch takes effect immediately and your next invoice shows a credit for the unused monthly days against the annual charge. I've applied the change on our side.
I added two custom fields under settings but they aren't showing when I create a new record.
New fields are hidden from the create form until you add them to a layout. Open Settings, Layouts, drag both fields onto the default record layout, and save. They'll appear right away.
I want to give a collaborator read-only access during onboarding. Which role should I assign?
Assign the Viewer role. It allows full read access to records and reports without edit or delete permissions, which is exactly right for a collaborator.
Our enquiry-form events are hitting BrightFox but the response is 401. The signing secret looks correct.
The 401 traces to a trailing space in the stored secret on our end. I've rotated it and sent the new value through the secure link. Resend a test event and you should see a 200.
We route enquiry-form events through Segment. How do we map the track call properties to BrightFox fields?

Enable the BrightFox destination in Segment, then use the mapping editor to bind each track property to a field. Name and email are required; everything else is optional and stored as custom properties.
For our records I'd like a one-time export of all records and notes. Is there a self-serve option?
Yes. Settings, Data, Export builds a full archive and emails a download link when it's ready, usually within a few minutes. The link stays valid for 24 hours.
I'm building a small dashboard and need a read-only API key. Which scopes cover records and events?
Create the key under Settings, API and grant records:read and events:read. Those two scopes cover everything a dashboard needs without exposing write access.
Can I require 2FA for everyone on the account, and is authenticator-app support available?
Turn on Require 2FA under Security and members are prompted to enroll at next login. Authenticator apps and hardware keys are both supported; SMS is optional.
Our class registrations from the arts center site aren't appearing under the linked list. Last sync was two days ago.
I can see the sync stalled on a malformed phone value in one row. I've paused that record and the queue is moving again. Could you confirm the registration count looks right on your end now?
I'd like to rename the onboarding pipeline stages to match my own workflow. Does that break existing records?
Renaming a stage keeps every record on it; only the label changes. I'd avoid deleting stages with records attached. Let me know the new names and I can review the layout with you.
We want a sandbox to test the new webhook before pushing it live. Is that included on our plan?
A single sandbox is included on the Business plan. I'm provisioning one for you now and will send the environment URL once it's ready. It mirrors your current settings but uses isolated data.
Is there a recommended default cadence for the onboarding email sequence, or should I build it from scratch?
We ship a three-email starter cadence at day 0, day 3, and day 7 that you can clone and edit. Most studios keep the timing and just rewrite the copy in their own voice.
